embedded_persona_count_note: FDN-7 / F1.3 gate 3 — the 5th SET-triad member: COUNT(DISTINCT persona_id) actually embedded in the PUBLISHED release asset (gemini-index.sqlite.gz). Written by shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh from the real asset; a --no-asset staging bump (persona_fleet.py set-manifest-counts) deliberately DOES NOT touch it, so it lags persona_count and asset_rebuild_required flips to true. When asset_rebuild_required is false this MUST equal persona_count/canonical_persona_count; a mismatch means the SET carries a counted-but-vector-less persona (Layer-5 degrades to keyword). Enforced by persona_fleet.py triad and persona-set-asset-consistency-guard.yml (with an explicit --no-asset carve-out).
persona_set_note: md5 + lastUpdated of the canonical 22-…/persona-categories.json this asset was built against. The N38 count-triad assertion (qc-assert-repo-consistency.py:_persona_set_triad_failures) and persona-set-asset-consistency-guard.yml fail CI if blueprint dirs != categories keys != persona_count != canonical_persona_count. TRIAD NOTE: the published v2.3.0 asset embeds 81 personas (embedded_persona_count=81); FDN-1 adds the hand-authored blackceo-house-voice DEFAULT_PERSONA_FALLBACK as the 82nd persona (blueprint dir + persona-categories.json key), so the four SET counts (blueprint dirs == categories keys == persona_count == canonical_persona_count == 82) roll to 82 in this same mergeable change while asset_rebuild_required flips to true because the fallback's vectors are not yet embedded (it carries NO perspective/specialty tags and is EXCLUDED from the scoring funnel, so the fleet stays fully functional). persona_set_md5 + persona_set_version are RE-STAMPED (via persona_fleet.py set-manifest-counts) against THIS change's persona-categories.json, which also carries the F1.4/DEP-12 SCHEMA-1.2 additive `needs_retag` marker. Rebuild incrementally via shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh (HASH-SKIP embeds only the +1 delta) — NEVER a full re-embed.
section_tag_note: embeddings table carries section_number + mode columns. coaching rows at section_number=3, leadership/governance rows at section_number=4. mode values: {both, coaching, leadership}. Section-tagged rows allow mode-aware retrieval without a full re-index.

delta_provider_backstamp.status: RESOLVED — every row in the v2.3.0 asset is stamped provider=gemini/model=gemini-embedding-2/dim=3072 (0 blank-provider rows).
delta_provider_backstamp.defect: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT omitted provider/model/dim columns. The 11 delta personas added to v2.2.0 arrived with provider=NULL, model=NULL, dim=NULL. init_db() backfill only fires when columns are absent — it never re-runs on existing NULL rows — so the prebuilt v2.2.0 asset shipped with 161 blank-provider rows across the 11 newest personas.
delta_provider_backstamp.fix: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT now explicitly writes provider='gemini', model=GEMINI_MODEL, dim=GEMINI_OUTPUT_DIM on every row. build-and-publish.sh step 1.5 backstamps any remaining NULL rows after downloading the base asset (no re-embed: inferred from blob length 12288 bytes = 3072 dims * 4 bytes/float32). ensure_v2_1_schema() now adds provider/model/dim columns.
delta_provider_backstamp.verified: 2026-07-04: the published v2.3.0 asset was re-downloaded (no auth) and inspected — 1161 rows / 81 personas, every vector 12288-byte float32 @ dim 3072, single (provider,model,dim) = (gemini, gemini-embedding-2, 3072), 0 NULL/blank-provider rows. get_db_index_provider() returns ('gemini', 'gemini-embedding-2') cleanly.

pr363_personas.note: All 10 PR-363 canonical personas are present in this asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged (first shipped in v2.1.0; carried forward since).

orphan_blueprints_shipped.note: All 3 orphan-blueprint personas are present in this asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged, fully operational for both Coaching Mode and Task/Agent-Governance mode (first shipped in v2.1.0).

notes: v2.3.0 — canonical 81-persona SECTION-TAGGED asset with GA gemini-embedding-2 @3072: 81 personas / 1161 section rows, one row per '## Section N' with section_number + mode tags (coaching=3, leadership=4; mode in {both, coaching, leadership}; sections 0–14). Every vector is 12288-byte float32 @ dim 3072; every row is stamped provider=gemini/model=gemini-embedding-2/dim=3072 (0 blank-provider rows). Expands the 65-persona v2.2.1 by the 16 newest book personas. Shipped AS-IS from the operator's live verified index (NO re-embed, NO dedup) — gzip + sha256 + GitHub Release upload only. Clients download this asset instead of re-embedding per box. SHA256 verified against the published release asset before install. FLEET NOTE: this manifest points update-skills.sh at the v2.3.0 asset (via provision-persona-index.sh, which reads asset_url + sha256 + release_tag from here). TRIAD NOTE: the persona-set-asset-consistency-guard requires blueprint dirs == categories keys == persona_count == canonical_persona_count; those repo-side counts (65 on main at publish time) must reach 81 via the 16 new blueprint dirs + persona-categories.json keys in the SAME mergeable change as this manifest bump. Publishing a delta going forward: shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh — HASH-SKIP embeds only new/changed personas, REAL-VECTOR HARD GATE (every row gemini/3072) + count triad must pass before upload; then update tests/unit/prebuilt-index-section-tagged.test.sh (KNOWN_TAGS + counts). (F1.5: the former 'ROHDE NOTE (open)' was removed — the selector's _CATEGORY_DOMAINS['design'] now includes visual-storytelling, so rohde-the-sketchnote-workbook has no category-map gap; the stale note was causing re-litigation of a fixed defect.)
asset_verified: 2026-07-04: downloaded the published v2.3.0 asset (no auth); sha256 matches this manifest (6cc5f9a1...3cdf); 1161 rows / 81 personas; every vector 12288-byte float32 @ dim 3072; single (provider,model,dim) = (gemini, gemini-embedding-2, 3072); section_number + mode columns present (coaching@3=81, leadership@4=81).
fleet_sync_note: Count fields synced hermetically by publish-personas-to-fleet.sh (--no-asset): blueprint dirs == categories keys == persona_count == canonical_persona_count. The release ASSET (embeddings) still needs a real delta embed+publish via shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh (or a full publish-personas-to-fleet.sh run) before the fleet points at it.
house_voice_fallback_note: FDN-1 (F3.1/Q2): added blackceo-house-voice — a hand-authored, brand-neutral DEFAULT_PERSONA_FALLBACK tagged fallback:true in persona-categories.json (EXCLUDED from the scoring funnel; only persona-selector-v2.py _fallback_persona() returns it). Triad re-baselined 81->82 (blueprint dirs == categories keys == persona_count == canonical_persona_count == 82). asset_rebuild_required=true: the published v2.3.0 vector asset still embeds 81 personas (file_count/chunk_count/sha256/asset_url unchanged); house-voice carries NO custom/perspective tags and never wins on semantic score, so the fleet stays fully functional until the operator runs shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh to embed the +1 delta and republish.
